info.name: AI Security Gateway API
info.description:
API collection for AI Security Gateway — the AI Firewall & Governance Gateway.

Default Base URL: http://localhost:8000 (self-hosted via Docker Compose)
Managed Cloud: https://api.aisecuritygateway.ai

Authentication: Bearer token.

All requests go through the AI Firewall, which scans for PII, prompt injections, and enforces DLP policies before forwarding to the LLM provider.

item.name: Models
item.description: Discover available models programmatically. Returns live data — disabled providers and retired models are excluded in real-time.

request.description:
Returns all available models with pricing, capabilities, and provider information.

Response includes extended fields beyond the OpenAI spec: `providers`, `pricing`, `supports_vision`, `supports_tools`, `supports_reasoning`, `family`, `context_window`, and `max_output_tokens`.

Expected: 200 OK with `{ "object": "list", "data": [...] }`

Filter models by family name. Common families: llama, gpt, claude, gemini, deepseek, mistral, grok, qwen.

Expected: 200 OK with only models from the specified family.

Filter by model capability. Supported values: vision, tools, json_mode, reasoning.

Expected: 200 OK with only models that support the specified capability.

Filter by provider. Supported values: together, deepinfra, openai, anthropic, gemini, mistral, xai, bedrock.

Expected: 200 OK with only models available from the specified provider.

Basic chat completion request.

Expected: 200 OK with an OpenAI-compatible response body plus `aisg_metadata` containing DLP scan details.

Streaming request. The AI Firewall scans the full request for PII, then streams the response as Server-Sent Events (SSE).

Expected: 200 OK with Content-Type: text/event-stream

item.name: Security Tests
item.description: Requests designed to trigger the AI Firewall's DLP defenses.

request.description:
Contains PII entities: email and SSN.

Default policy (REDACT): 200 OK — PII replaced with [REDACTED] before reaching the LLM.

Expected response includes aisg_metadata.pii_detected: true

Contains developer secrets: OpenAI API key and AWS access key.

Expected: 200 OK with secrets redacted before forwarding.

Liveness / readiness probe. No authentication required.

Expected: 200 OK with {"status": "healthy"}
